title: Data displayed in Monday.com
excerpt: I currently use a widget to show client contact ifnormation so my staff doesn’t have to scroll across multiple columns each time they need a phone number etc.  Until recently, the columns were displayed one on top of the…

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: I currently use a widget to show client contact ifnormation so my staff doesn’t have to scroll across multiple columns each time they need a phone number etc. Until recently, the columns were displayed one on top of the other in order of my table view. But now, something has changed and the columns are displayed side by side all the way across my widget and it’s extremely difficult to decipher the information/column I’m looking for.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Amanda,

Can you please clarify which widget you’re referring to? If possible (and no confidential information is shared) is it possible for you to share a screenshot so I can get a better idea of what’s happening on your end?

posts.author: awright (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s an item card. I sent an email to monday.com help desk and apparently there is nothing that can be done about it. Thanks for the trying to assist.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for clarifying Amanda. I am sorry that the expected functionality and format is causing some inconveniences. I have shared your feedback internally with the relevant teams
